items.title: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
items.summary: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.

items.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
items.summary: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

items.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
items.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been sentenced to four years in jail.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 新聞分析》川普急於從伊朗抽身 對黨內鷹派難交代
items.summary: 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕隨著與伊朗達成和平協議的框架共識，美國總統川普或許找到一條開始讓自己從這場戰爭中抽身的路，同時引導全球市場緩解在危機期間飆升的能源價格。但他最終接受的這份協議，顯然未能達到他在衝突初期所概述的多項目標，這可能使他遭受共和黨內對伊強硬派的攻擊，並讓美國在戰略上顯得比開戰前更為…

items.title: 美伊核心領域談判 未來60天挑戰多
items.summary: 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕針對旨在結束中東衝突的初步協議內容，美國、伊朗和調停國巴基斯坦揭露的輪廓，包括分階段執行、重啟荷姆茲海峽，以及後續核武談判的框架： 一、時程劃分與海峽重啟 停火與簽署：巴基斯坦總理夏立夫表示，雙方已宣布立即且永久停火。各方證實，將於十九日在瑞士簽署終戰諒解備忘錄（MOU…
